channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Slay The Spire 2 Dev Sets Record Straight On Controversial Boss - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Slay The Spire 2 Dev Sets Record Straight On Controversial Boss  Kotaku
  2. Slay the Spire 2 Update Patch Notes Revealed  IGN
  3. Slay the Spire 2 dev avoids putting dates on first roadmap because 'it's not what works for us'  Polygon.com
  4. New Slay the Spire 2 update reworks Ironclad's most unpopular card and makes lower Ascensions easier  PCGamesN
  5. Slay the Spire 2 dev says an early idea was to actually reduce the card pool, but players hated it: 'We need new stuff!'  Yahoo Tech

item.title: I Am Artemis: Peter Rossoni - NASA (.gov)
item.description:
1. I Am Artemis: Peter Rossoni  NASA (.gov)
  2. You want your Moon landings in HD? So does NASA—here’s how it’s happening.  Ars Technica
  3. NASA’s Artemis II moon mission shows space-to-Earth laser comms can scale  TechCrunch
  4. NASA Artemis II proves laser comms can scale beyond Earth  The Tech Buzz
  5. MIT laser tech beams real-time moon images in Artemis II first  MSN

item.title: Disco Elysium dev's highly-anticipated follow-up, Zero Parades: For Dead Spies, has things to say about our nostalgia - Eurogamer.net
item.description:

  4. Zero Parades: For Dead Spies Introduces the Crew  RPGamer
  5. Zero Parades: For Dead Spies and the 1 big warning hidden in its nostalgia  El-Balad.com

item.title: No RAMpocalypse at Apple: iPhone 18 in for 50% RAM boost, super-efficient 2nm A20 chip on track - Notebookcheck
item.description:
1. No RAMpocalypse at Apple: iPhone 18 in for 50% RAM boost, super-efficient 2nm A20 chip on track  Notebookcheck
  2. Apple's entry-level iPhone 18 rumored to get 50% more RAM  AppleInsider
  3. Leaker: Apple to Downgrade iPhone 18 in Two Ways  MacRumors
  4. The iPhone 18 was just tipped for a very surprising upgrade  Tom's Guide
  5. iPhone 18’s new specs might bring subtle regressions to cut costs  9to5Mac

item.title: "It's almost impossible to recommend the Surface Laptop 13": I compare it to the MacBook Neo after Microsoft's price hike - Windows Central
item.description:
1. "It's almost impossible to recommend the Surface Laptop 13": I compare it to the MacBook Neo after Microsoft's price hike  Windows Central
  2. Microsoft Surface Pro and Surface Laptop launch reportedly pushed back by about a month  VideoCardz.com
  3. 'Prices are probably going to be so bad, no one will be able to afford the things anyway': worrying rumor aired on the cost of Microsoft's next-gen Surface devices  TechRadar
  4. Microsoft’s Premium Surface Refresh Leaves MacBook Neo’s Value Lead Intact  Qoo Media
  5. Surface Laptop 13-inch vs. MacBook Neo: Rising prices make Microsoft's lightweight darling a tough sell, but I still prefer Windows  Yahoo Tech
